selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 32 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, S-101/OpenCPN/AquaMap provider witnesses where available, Chart No.1 parity crops where available, and actual batch-32 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: BCNDEF13 is the simplified default symbol for a beacon: S-57 object BCNSPP with instruction SY(BCNDEF13), requiring the default beacon/daymark shape and unknown/special-purpose cue rather than a lateral, cardinal, safe-water, or isolated-danger substitution.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct beacon class, simplified default form, gray panel shape, magenta question-mark convention, and no dangerous confusion with a specific beacon subtype. Visual scale is Helm-styled but tracks the provider witnesses; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a simplified gray beacon/daymark panel with black outline and a magenta question mark cue, matching the S-101/OpenCPN default-beacon witness family.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN01 is beacon in general: S-57 object BCNLAT with instruction SY(BCNGEN01), requiring a black pile beacon form and no topmark or color-band substitution.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct general/lateral beacon class, full-chart pile form, black load-bearing stroke, base/crossbar convention, and no confusion with special-purpose, safe-water, or isolated-danger marks. The blue center is the provider witness cue and is not treated as an unsafe color-family change.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black pile/pole beacon with horizontal base/crossbar and a small light-blue pivot/datum circle, matching the S-101/OpenCPN general beacon witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN03 is the default paper-chart beacon symbol: S-57 object BCNCAR with instruction SY(BCNGEN03), requiring a black beacon/daymark family shape plus default/unknown cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct beacon family, paper/default cue, black load-bearing form, and no lateral/safe-water/isolated-danger substitution. Candidate preserves the S-101/OpenCPN mark convention while using Helm stroke scale; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate keeps the black beacon pole/base with small blue datum circle and adds the magenta question-mark default cue, matching the paper/default beacon witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNISD21 is isolated danger beacon, simplified: S-57 object BCNISD with instruction SY(BCNISD21), requiring the isolated-danger two-ball/dot convention and red load-bearing cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct isolated-danger class, simplified two-mark topmark convention, vertical order/count, red/black danger cue, and no dangerous confusion with special-purpose or generic beacon panels. Visual parity is close to S-101/OpenCPN/AquaMap witnesses; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is two vertically stacked red circular danger marks with black outlines and no generic striped beacon body.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNLTC01 is lattice beacon: S-57 object BCNCAR with instruction SY(BCNLTC01), requiring a black lattice/tower beacon rather than a plain pole, panel, buoy, or topmark-only symbol.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct lattice beacon class, full-chart tower/lattice silhouette, internal X-bracing, black load-bearing stroke, and no unsafe simplification into a generic stake. Styling is heavier than the tiny OpenCPN render but consistent with Helm repaired artwork; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black open lattice/tower beacon with crossed internal braces, base bar, and circular base cue.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNSAW13 is major safe water beacon, simplified: S-57 object BCNSAW with instruction SY(BCNSAW13), requiring the safe-water simplified beacon/tower witness shape and load-bearing black mark convention from the row metadata.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct safe-water beacon class, major/wider simplified tower form, black body, center cue, and no confusion with yellow special-purpose or red isolated-danger marks. AquaMap safe-water witness was used as support only; candidate follows the S-101/OpenCPN beacon presentation. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a wide black major safe-water beacon tower/panel with the small blue center cue preserved.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNSAW21 is minor safe water beacon, simplified: S-57 object BCNSAW with instruction SY(BCNSAW21), requiring the minor stake/perch safe-water beacon convention rather than the wider major tower form.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct safe-water class, minor/narrow stake form, black load-bearing body, center cue, and no dangerous confusion with special-purpose yellow or isolated-danger red topmarks. Candidate differs in stroke scale only; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a narrow black minor safe-water stake/perch beacon with a small blue center cue.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNSPP13 is major special purpose beacon, simplified: S-57 object BCNSPP with instruction SY(BCNSPP13), requiring the special-purpose beacon tower convention and yellow/special-purpose visual family where available.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct special-purpose beacon class, major/wider tower form, yellow load-bearing body, black center cue, and no confusion with safe-water black or isolated-danger red marks. AquaMap yellow/black special-purpose support refs agree with the color family; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a yellow major special-purpose beacon tower/panel with black outline and a small black center cue.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNSPP21 is minor special purpose beacon, simplified: S-57 object BCNSPP with instruction SY(BCNSPP21), requiring the special-purpose stake/perch convention and not the major/wide tower form.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct special-purpose beacon class, minor/narrow stake form, yellow special-purpose color family, black center cue, and no confusion with safe-water black or isolated-danger red conventions. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a narrow yellow minor special-purpose stake/perch beacon with black outline and small black center cue.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNSTK02 is minor stake or pole beacon: S-57 object BCNCAR with instruction SY(BCNSTK02), requiring a black stake/perch beacon silhouette.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct stake/pole beacon class, full-chart minor form, black load-bearing stroke, no invented topmark or banding, and no dangerous confusion with tower/lattice/safe-water/special-purpose variants. Visual style is heavier but faithful enough for judge pass pending final approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a plain black stake or pole beacon with vertical stem and base bar, with no added topmark, panel, color fill, or buoy body.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: BCNTOW01 is beacon tower: S-57 object BCNCAR with instruction SY(BCNTOW01), requiring a black beacon tower silhouette distinct from lattice, stake, buoy, and topmark-only symbols.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct tower beacon class, full-chart open tower shape, black load-bearing stroke, no added lattice braces, and no unsafe class confusion. Candidate follows S-101/OpenCPN/Chart No.1 tower witnesses with Helm stroke scale; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black open beacon tower/trapezoid with base bar and circular base cue, without the lattice X-bracing of BCNLTC01.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
